name: Fill The Glass With Juice
description: A bright and calming puzzle game based on realistic fluid physics. Feel like a virtual juice master! Your task is to help the freshly squeezed orange juice find its way to the glass by drawing whimsical paths and channels for it. Enjoy the spectacle as the juicy orange liquid cheerfully spills and flows along the trajectories you created. The levels gradually become more difficult, introducing new obstacles and challenges that will require your wit and precision. Its the perfect game to relax, train your logic, and enjoy the colorful visuals and engaging gameplay. Will you be able to fill the glass to the brim without spilling a single drop
instructions: Swipe your finger or mouse cursor on a computer across the screen to draw a path-channel for the juice Release your finger mdash and the orange juice will flow along the route you created Your goal is to fill the glass to the required level
